results.description: The first two days of the Tony Andenucio Memorial Tournament in Colorado did not go in the favor of the Outlaw Baseball Club, which lost four straight games Thursday and Friday by a combined nine runs to cap off a...

results.title: The Angels Must Trade Two Key Pieces Now, So They Won’t
results.description: The 2023 MLB trade deadline was filled with trade hype for Los Angeles Angels superstar, Shohei Ohtani. He was in his final year of club control and had already made three American League All-Star appearances.

results.title: Maresca Agrees To Take Over At Man City
results.description: Manchester City are close to completing a deal to appoint Enzo Maresca as head coach, according to Sky in Italy. It is being reported a verbal agreement has been reached between all parties, with Sky in Italy saying City will pay Chelsea more than £17m (€20m) in compensation to make Maresca Pep Guardiola’s successor at [...] The post Maresca Agrees To Take Over At Man City appeared first on Complete Sports .
